zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese de Bollington於大約1070年出生在英國爾波利頓時，她的父親Robert Bolington14歲，母親Mrs. Robert Bolington22歲。她和Osbern d'Arques至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1118年在英國越可爾索普 阿其享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese de Bollington于大约1070年出生在英国爾波利頓时，她的父亲Robert Bolington14岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Bolington22岁。她和Osbern d'Arques至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1118年在英国越可爾索普 阿其享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bollington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bullington
meanings: variant of   Billington  , found as such in colonial VA.

habitational name from Bullington in Lincolnshire, named in Old English ‘the settlement (tūn) associated with (connective particle -ing) a man named Bula’. Alternatively, a variant of Bollington, a habitational name from Bollington in Cheshire, named in Old English ‘the settlement (tūn) on the river Bolling’. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese de Bollington was born about 1070, in Bollington, Cheshire, England, her father, Robert Bolington, was 14 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Bolington, was 22. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Osbern d'Arques. She died about 1118, in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese de Bollington est née environ 1070, à Bollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bolington, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Bolington, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Osbern d'Arques. Elle est décédée environ 1118, à Thorp Arch, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Sie hatte mit Osbern d'Arques mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1118 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Bollingtonが約1070年にイギリスチェシュアイアボリントンで生まれた時，父Robert Bolingtonは14歳，母Mrs. Robert Bolingtonは22歳であった。彼女はOsbern d'Arquesとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1118年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルプ アーチで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Bollington(이)가 대략 1070년 영국 체실르 볼링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Bolington(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Bolington(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Osbern d'Arques(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1118년 영국 요르크실르 소 아치에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese de Bollington родилась около 1070 г. в местности боллингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Bolington было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Bolington, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Osbern d'Arques. Она умерла около 1118 г. в местности таурп арч, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.
